invariants.text: forall i: int {:trigger result[i]} | 0 <= i < |result| :: forall m: int {:trigger stops[m]} | 0 <= m < k :: InSeq(result[i], stops[m])
forall x: int {:trigger InSeq(x, result)} :: (forall m: int {:trigger stops[m]} | 0 <= m < k :: InSeq(x, stops[m])) ==> InSeq(x, result)

forall idx: int {:trigger result[idx]} | 0 <= idx < i :: InSeq(result[idx], stops[k]) ==> InSeq(result[idx], newResult)
found <==> exists j': int {:trigger stops[k][j']} | 0 <= j' < j :: result[i] == stops[k][j']

assertions.text: forall i: int {:trigger newResult[i]} | 0 <= i < |newResult| :: forall m: int {:trigger stops[m]} | 0 <= m < k + 1 :: InSeq(newResult[i], stops[m])

ensures.text: forall i: int {:trigger result[i]} | 0 <= i < |result| :: PossibleLine(result[i], stops)
forall k: int {:trigger stops[k]} | 0 <= k < |stops| :: forall j: int {:trigger stops[k][j]} | 0 <= j < |stops[k]| :: PossibleLine(stops[k][j], stops) ==> InSeq(stops[k][j], result)

forall k: int {:trigger stops[k]} | 0 <= k < |stops| :: forall j: int {:trigger stops[k][j]} | 0 <= j < |stops[k]| :: PossibleLine(stops[k][j], stops) ==> InSeq(stops[k][j], result)
